hero.title: Recruitment, orchestrated
hero.subtitle: Centralize your missions, candidates and clients. Save time. Deliver a premium candidate experience.

step1.title: Create your mission
step1.description: Define the position with our structured Job Builder. Automatically generate views for your clients and candidates.

step2.title: Source intelligently
step2.description: Import candidates via CSV, URL or text. Our AI automatically structures and scores profiles.

step3.title: Schedule interviews
step3.description: Native Calendly integration. Candidates book directly, pipeline updates automatically.

step4.title: Share and collect
step4.description: Send clean shortlists to clients. Receive their structured feedback in one click.

speed.title: Save time
speed.description: Automate repetitive tasks. Focus on what matters: the human relationship.

consistency.title: Standardize your processes
consistency.description: Job descriptions, shortlists, feedback: everything is structured and professional.

capitalize.title: Build your talent pool
capitalize.description: Every candidate enriches your database. Find them easily for future missions.

experience.title: Premium candidate experience
experience.description: Guided portal, mobile-friendly, jargon-free. Your candidates will thank you.

cta.title: Ready to transform your recruitment?
cta.subtitle: 14-day free trial. No credit card required to start.

product.title: Everything you need
product.subtitle: A complete platform to manage your recruitments from A to Z

jobBuilder.title: Multi-audience Job Builder
jobBuilder.description: Create one job description, get three views: internal, client, candidate.

candidateDb.title: Intelligent candidate database
candidateDb.description: A single talent pool, continuously enriched, always exploitable.

pipeline.title: Pipeline and interactions
pipeline.description: Track each candidate through the recruitment process.

candidatePortal.title: Candidate portal
candidatePortal.description: A guided experience for your candidates, friction-free.

clientPortal.title: Client portal
clientPortal.description: Share your shortlists and collect structured feedback.

ai.title: AI assistance
ai.description: AI at the service of your efficiency, not replacing your expertise.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your agency. All plans include core features. Switch anytime.
pricing.canceled: You canceled the payment. No worries, you can try again anytime.
pricing.trialInfo: 14-day free trial. Credit card required. Cancel anytime.

trial.question: What is the free trial?
trial.answer: You have 14 days to test ORCHESTR with no commitment. A credit card is required but you won't be charged until the trial ends. You can cancel anytime during this period.

fairUse.question: What does fair-use AI mean?
fairUse.answer: AI features like scoring and message generation are included in all plans. We monitor usage to ensure optimal performance. Only intensive automated workflows may be limited, not normal daily use.

changePlan.question: Can I change plans?
changePlan.answer: Yes. You can upgrade or downgrade at any time. Changes take effect at the start of your next billing cycle. Your data is always preserved.

billing.question: How does per-user billing work?
billing.answer: You are billed based on the number of active users in your organization. You can add or remove users at any time from your billing settings.

cta.title: Need help choosing?
cta.subtitle: Our team is here to help you find the right fit for your agency.

security.title: Security and compliance
security.subtitle: Your data is our priority. Learn how we protect it.

dataStorage.title: Data storage
dataStorage.description: Your data is stored on secure servers in Europe.

accessControl.title: Access control
accessControl.description: Robust mechanisms to protect access to your data.

portals.title: Portal security
portals.description: Sharing links are secure and controllable.

vulnerability.title: Report a vulnerability
vulnerability.description: Found a security issue? Contact us.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: A question? A project? Our team responds within 24 hours.

success.title: Message sent!
success.description: We will get back to you as soon as possible.
